ECS.name: Explanation Consistency Score
ECS.definition: Mean pairwise cosine similarity among repeated explanations for the same case and model.
ECS.range: 0 to 1 in normal use; higher means more consistent explanations.

EVR.name: Explanation Variability Rate
EVR.definition: Mean consecutive explanation distance, computed as 1 - cosine similarity between adjacent repetitions.
EVR.range: 0 to 1 in normal use; lower means less variability.

EDI.name: Explanation Drift Index
EDI.definition: Mean distance from the first repetition, computed as 1 - cosine similarity between repetition 1 and later repetitions.
EDI.range: 0 to 1 in normal use; lower means less drift from the initial explanation.
